the CCW Virtual Research Data Center (VRDC). 

The CCW team packages files delivered physically in encrypted self-decrypting archives (SDAs). The encryption 
technique for files extracted from the CCW uses Pretty Good Privacy Command Line 9.0 with the SDA method. This 
method builds a compressed, encrypted, password protected file using a FIPS 140-1/140-2 approved AES256 cipher 
algorithm. The CCW team builds the SDA on the CCW production server, downloads it to a desktop PC, and burns it to
